untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calendar-based event detection (exchange holiday timing) which is not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. This signal depends on external calendar data (T-3 days and T-1 days relative to exchange holidays) rather than price/technical indicators. Implementation requires a calendar module or external holiday dataset outside the scope of standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_10 is an event-based seasonal strategy pioneered by Arthur Merrill. Entry occurs on close of third trading day before an exchange holiday; exit occurs on close one day before the holiday (2 days after entry). This requires calendar/event lookup functionality not present in allowed indicators. Recommend implementing via: (1) external calendar integration, (2) pre-computed holiday flags, or (3) rule engine extension for event detection.
